name: agentic-os
description: Self-improving agent memory system with 13 skills (core + quality + knowledge + self-improve) and 6 hooks, including a PreToolUse shell circuit breaker. Self-improve runs are policy-gated (single-cluster, no-self-mod, rollback-tagged). MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.
